testTitle: Page loads successfully with all elements visible
preconditions: Browser is open, application is running
testSteps:
1. Navigate to `http://localhost:3000/auth/signup`
2. Verify page loads without errors
3. Verify all elements are visible
expectedResult: Page loads successfully, all form fields, buttons, and links are visible and correctly positioned

testTitle: Form renders with correct field types and attributes
testSteps:
1. Inspect Full Name field
2. Inspect Email field
3. Inspect Password field
4. Verify required attributes
testData:
- Full Name: type="text", required
- Email: type="email", required
- Password: type="password", required
expectedResult: All fields render with correct input types, required attributes, and placeholder text

testTitle: Navigation links direct to correct pages
testSteps:
1. Click "Sign in" link
2. Click "Continue as guest" link
3. Verify URL changes
expectedResult: User is redirected to `/auth/login` and `/chat` respectively

testTitle: Submit button is disabled during form submission
preconditions: Signup page is loaded, form filled
testSteps:
1. Fill all form fields
2. Click "Create Account" button
3. Verify button state
expectedResult: Button text changes to "Creating account...", button is disabled, cursor changes to not-allowed

testSteps:
1. Enter valid Full Name
2. Enter valid unique Email
3. Enter valid Password (6+ chars)
4. Click "Create Account"
expectedResult: POST `/api/auth/signup` is called with correct payload, user is created, tokens are stored in localStorage, user is redirected to `/dashboard`

testTitle: JWT tokens are stored in localStorage after successful signup
testSteps:
1. Complete signup flow
2. Check localStorage for tokens
3. Verify token format
expectedResult: `nexus_access_token` and `nexus_refresh_token` are stored in localStorage with valid JWT format

testSteps:
1. Enter valid name and email
2. Enter 5-character password
3. Click "Create Account"
expectedResult: Client-side validation error is displayed: "Password must be at least 6 characters." No API call is made

testSteps:
1. Enter valid name and email
2. Enter exactly 6-character password
3. Click "Create Account"
expectedResult: Form submits successfully, password validation passes

testTitle: Empty form submission with HTML5 validation
testSteps:
1. Leave all fields empty
2. Click "Create Account"
expectedResult: HTML5 validation prevents submission, browser shows default validation messages

testSteps:
1. Attempt to signup with already registered email
2. Verify error response
expectedResult: API returns 409 Conflict error with message "Email already in use", error is displayed to user

testSteps:
1. Enter valid name and password
2. Enter invalid email format
3. Click "Create Account"
expectedResult: HTML5 email validation prevents submission or client-side validation error is shown

testSteps:
1. Enter valid name and password
2. Enter email with special characters
3. Click "Create Account"
expectedResult: Email is accepted as valid, form submits successfully

testSteps:
1. Leave name field empty
2. Enter valid email and password
3. Click "Create Account"
expectedResult: HTML5 validation prevents submission, name field shows required validation

testSteps:
1. Enter valid name and password
2. Leave email field empty
3. Click "Create Account"
expectedResult: HTML5 validation prevents submission, email field shows required validation

testSteps:
1. Enter valid name and email
2. Leave password field empty
3. Click "Create Account"
expectedResult: HTML5 validation prevents submission, password field shows required validation

testSteps:
1. Enter name with special characters
2. Enter valid email and password
3. Click "Create Account"
expectedResult: Name is accepted, form submits successfully

testSteps:
1. Enter name with 100+ characters
2. Enter valid email and password
3. Click "Create Account"
expectedResult: Name is accepted or validation error is shown depending on backend constraints

testSteps:
1. Enter valid name and email
2. Enter password with 100+ characters
3. Click "Create Account"
expectedResult: Password is hashed and stored, user is created successfully

testTitle: Network error during signup API call
preconditions: User is on signup page, backend is down
testSteps:
1. Fill all fields with valid data
2. Click "Create Account"
3. Simulate network failure
expectedResult: Error message is displayed: "Registration failed. Please try again.", loading state is cleared

preconditions: User is on signup page, API is slow
testSteps:
1. Fill all fields with valid data
2. Click "Create Account"
3. Simulate API timeout
expectedResult: Appropriate error message is displayed after timeout, loading state is cleared

testSteps:
1. Fill all fields with valid data
2. Click "Create Account"
3. API returns malformed response
expectedResult: Error handling catches malformed response, generic error message is displayed

preconditions: Send POST request with incomplete data
testSteps:
1. Send POST `/api/auth/signup` with missing name
2. Verify validation error
expectedResult: API returns 400 Bad Request with validation error for missing field

testSteps:
1. Send POST `/api/auth/signup` with invalid JSON
2. Verify error response
expectedResult: API returns 400 Bad Request with parsing error

testTitle: SQL/NoSQL injection attempt in name field
testSteps:
1. Enter potential injection string in name
2. Enter valid email and password
3. Click "Create Account"
testData:
- Name: "'; DROP TABLE users; --"
- Email: "injection@example.com"
- Password: "Password123"
expectedResult: Input is sanitized or rejected, no injection occurs

testSteps:
1. Enter XSS payload in name
2. Enter valid email and password
3. Click "Create Account"
expectedResult: Input is sanitized, script is not executed when displayed

testSteps:
1. Enter valid name and email
2. Enter password with only numbers (6+)
3. Click "Create Account"
expectedResult: Password is accepted if no complexity requirement, otherwise validation error

testSteps:
1. Enter valid name and email
2. Enter password with only letters (6+)
3. Click "Create Account"
expectedResult: Password is accepted if no complexity requirement, otherwise validation error

testSteps:
1. Enter email with leading/trailing spaces
2. Enter valid name and password
3. Click "Create Account"
expectedResult: Email is trimmed before processing or validation error is shown

testSteps:
1. Enter name with leading/trailing spaces
2. Enter valid email and password
3. Click "Create Account"
expectedResult: Name is trimmed before processing

testSteps:
1. Attempt signup with same email in different case
2. Verify duplicate detection
expectedResult: Email is treated as case-insensitive, duplicate is detected

testSteps:
1. Fill form with valid data
2. Click "Create Account" multiple times rapidly
3. Verify only one request is sent
expectedResult: Loading state prevents multiple submissions, only one API call is made

testSteps:
1. Enter password in password field
2. Click visibility toggle icon (if present)
3. Verify password becomes visible
expectedResult: Password toggles between masked and visible states

testSteps:
1. Fill all form fields
2. Press Enter key in last field
3. Verify form submits
expectedResult: Form submits when Enter key is pressed in any field

testSteps:
1. Fill some form fields
2. Refresh page
3. Verify form state
expectedResult: Form fields are cleared, no data persists across refresh

testTitle: Back button navigation preserves form state
testSteps:
1. Fill all form fields
2. Navigate away and back using browser back
3. Verify form state
expectedResult: Form data is lost (no state preservation) or is preserved based on implementation

testSteps:
1. Complete signup
2. Wait for access token to expire (15 min)
3. Make authenticated request
expectedResult: Refresh token is used automatically to get new access token

preconditions: User has signed up, refresh token expired
testSteps:
1. Wait for refresh token to expire (7 days)
2. Make authenticated request
3. Verify logout behavior
expectedResult: User is logged out, redirected to login page, tokens are cleared

testTitle: Concurrent signup requests from same browser
testSteps:
1. Fill form and submit
2. Immediately fill form again and submit
3. Verify behavior
expectedResult: Both requests are processed independently or race condition is handled

testTitle: Signup with already logged in user
testSteps:
1. Log in as existing user
2. Navigate to `/auth/signup`
3. Verify behavior
expectedResult: User is redirected to dashboard or signup form is disabled

testSteps:
1. Complete signup
2. Verify password in storage is hashed
expectedResult: Password is hashed using bcrypt (12 rounds), plain text is never stored

testTitle: Refresh token is hashed before storage
testSteps:
1. Complete signup
2. Verify refresh token in storage is hashed
expectedResult: Refresh token is hashed using bcrypt (10 rounds) before storage

testTitle: User object in response excludes sensitive data
testSteps:
1. Complete signup
2. Inspect user object in response
expectedResult: Response user object contains only `_id`, `name`, `email`; password and refresh token are excluded

testTitle: Form displays error message from API
testSteps:
1. Trigger API error (e.g., duplicate email)
2. Verify error display
expectedResult: Error message from API is displayed in red error banner: "Email already in use"

testTitle: Error message clears on next successful attempt
testSteps:
1. Submit form with error
2. Correct the error
3. Submit again
4. Verify error clears
expectedResult: Previous error message is cleared on new submission attempt

testSteps:
1. Click on each input field
2. Verify focus styling
expectedResult: Active field shows visual focus indicator (border color change or outline)

testSteps:
1. Hover over each input field
2. Verify hover styling
expectedResult: Hovered field shows visual hover indicator

testSteps:
1. Hover over submit button
2. Verify hover styling
expectedResult: Button shows visual hover effect (color change or scale)

testSteps:
1. Trigger form submission
2. Verify disabled button styling
expectedResult: Button shows disabled styling (grayed out, not-allowed cursor)

testSteps:
1. Resize viewport to mobile (375x667)
2. Verify layout adapts
expectedResult: Form and all elements are properly sized and positioned, text is readable

testSteps:
1. Resize viewport to tablet (768x1024)
2. Verify layout adapts
expectedResult: Form and all elements are properly sized and positioned

testSteps:
1. Resize viewport to desktop (1920x1080)
2. Verify layout adapts
expectedResult: Form is centered and properly sized, maximum width is respected

testSteps:
1. Enter name with emoji
2. Enter valid email and password
3. Click "Create Account"
expectedResult: Emoji characters are accepted or validation error is shown

testSteps:
1. Enter email with Unicode domain
2. Enter valid name and password
3. Click "Create Account"
expectedResult: Unicode email is accepted or validation error is shown

testSteps:
1. Enter password with special characters
2. Enter valid name and email
3. Click "Create Account"
expectedResult: Password with special characters is accepted

testSteps:
1. Enter name exceeding backend limit
2. Enter valid email and password
3. Click "Create Account"
expectedResult: Validation error is shown or request is rejected by backend

testSteps:
1. Enter valid name and email
2. Enter password exceeding backend limit
3. Click "Create Account"
expectedResult: Validation error is shown or request is rejected by backend

testTitle: API rate limiting on signup endpoint
testSteps:
1. Send multiple signup requests rapidly
2. Verify rate limiting
expectedResult: After threshold, API returns 429 Too Many Requests

testSteps:
1. Complete signup
2. Inspect response headers
3. Verify security headers
expectedResult: Response includes security headers (X-Content-Type-Options, etc.)

testSteps:
1. Focus on email field
2. Verify browser autocomplete suggestions
expectedResult: Email field shows autocomplete suggestions if available

testSteps:
1. Focus on password field
2. Verify autocomplete behavior
expectedResult: Password field may or may not show autocomplete based on security settings

testTitle: Form submission with pre-filled data from browser
testSteps:
1. Navigate to signup page
2. Verify browser fills form
3. Submit with pre-filled data
expectedResult: Form is pre-filled, submission works correctly

testSteps:
1. Clear browser cache
2. Navigate to signup page
3. Measure load time
expectedResult: Page loads within 3 seconds

testSteps:
1. Open browser console
2. Navigate to signup page
3. Interact with form
4. Check for errors
expectedResult: No JavaScript errors are logged to console

testTitle: Accessibility - ARIA labels on form fields
testSteps:
1. Inspect form elements
2. Verify ARIA attributes
expectedResult: All form fields have proper labels and ARIA attributes

testSteps:
1. Use Tab key to navigate form
2. Verify focus order
3. Use Enter to submit
expectedResult: Focus moves logically through fields, form submits with Enter

testSteps:
1. Enable screen reader
2. Navigate form
3. Verify announcements
expectedResult: All form fields, labels, and errors are announced correctly

testSteps:
1. Trigger error message
2. Attempt to dismiss error
3. Verify behavior
expectedResult: Error message may be dismissible or auto-dismiss after timeout

testSteps:
1. Submit form with multiple errors
2. Verify error display
expectedResult: All relevant errors are displayed or only first error is shown

testSteps:
1. Fill form with invalid data
2. Click submit
3. Verify validation timing
expectedResult: Validation occurs before API call, no network request is made

testTitle: Name field accepts hyphens and apostrophes
testSteps:
1. Enter name with hyphens/apostrophes
2. Enter valid email and password
3. Click "Create Account"
expectedResult: Name with hyphens and apostrophes is accepted

testSteps:
1. Enter email with subdomain
2. Enter valid name and password
3. Click "Create Account"
expectedResult: Email with subdomain is accepted

testSteps:
1. Enter email with numbers
2. Enter valid name and password
3. Click "Create Account"
expectedResult: Email with numbers is accepted

testSteps:
1. Enter password with spaces
2. Enter valid name and email
3. Click "Create Account"
expectedResult: Password with spaces is accepted or trimmed

testSteps:
1. Click "Continue as guest" link
2. Verify navigation and session creation
expectedResult: User is redirected to `/chat`, guest session is created with 3-hour expiry

testTitle: Direct navigation to signup when authenticated
testSteps:
1. Log in as existing user
2. Directly navigate to `/auth/signup`
3. Verify behavior
expectedResult: User is redirected to dashboard or shows message about being logged in

testSteps:
1. Verify placeholder text in empty fields
2. Verify placeholder disappears on input
expectedResult: Placeholders are visible when fields are empty, disappear when user starts typing

testSteps:
1. Verify all field labels are visible
2. Verify label association with input
expectedResult: All labels are visible and properly associated with their input fields

testSteps:
1. Inspect submit button
2. Verify text alignment
expectedResult: Button text is centered and properly aligned

testSteps:
1. Inspect form container
2. Verify styling elements
expectedResult: Container has proper border radius, padding, shadow, and background color

testSteps:
1. Inspect page background
2. Verify gradient is applied
expectedResult: Radial gradient background is correctly rendered

testSteps:
1. Verify logo icon is visible
2. Verify logo alignment
expectedResult: Logo icon is visible and properly aligned in header

testSteps:
1. Inspect page title
2. Verify meta tags
expectedResult: Page title is "NexusAI — AI Model Hub · Discover, Compare & Deploy" with correct meta description

testSteps:
1. Verify fonts are loaded
2. Check text rendering
expectedResult: Custom fonts (Syne, Instrument Sans) are loaded and text renders correctly

testSteps:
1. Check color contrast of text
2. Verify WCAG compliance
expectedResult: All text has sufficient color contrast (4.5:1 for normal text)

testSteps:
1. Verify button and link touch targets
2. Check minimum size (44x44px)
expectedResult: All interactive elements meet minimum touch target size

testSteps:
1. Tab through form fields
2. Verify focus outline is visible
expectedResult: Focus outline is clearly visible and meets contrast requirements

testSteps:
1. Trigger error message
2. Check color contrast
expectedResult: Error message text has sufficient contrast against background

testSteps:
1. Inspect all links
2. Verify consistent styling
expectedResult: All links have consistent styling (color, hover state, underlines)

testSteps:
1. Inspect input field borders
2. Verify consistent styling
expectedResult: All input fields have consistent border styling (width, color, radius)

testSteps:
1. Measure spacing between elements
2. Verify consistent layout
expectedResult: Spacing between form elements is consistent and visually balanced

testSteps:
1. Scroll page if content overflows
2. Verify scroll behavior
expectedResult: Page scrolls smoothly, no horizontal scroll on normal viewport

testSteps:
1. Fill form and submit
2. Verify page doesn't reload
expectedResult: Form submission is handled via JavaScript, page does not reload
